cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/billing/__init__.py b/billing/__init__.py
index fad8120..4ac7462 100644
--- a/billing/__init__.py
+++ b/billing/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,7 @@
 
 def with_tax(amount_cents, rate_bps):
     return amount_cents + amount_cents * rate_bps // 10000
+
+def split_evenly(total_cents, n):
+    base, rem = divmod(total_cents, n)
+    return [base + (1 if i < rem else 0) for i in range(n)]

cases.name: drops_remainder
cases.diff:
diff --git a/billing/__init__.py b/billing/__init__.py
index fad8120..8045326 100644
--- a/billing/__init__.py
+++ b/billing/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,6 @@
 
 def with_tax(amount_cents, rate_bps):
     return amount_cents + amount_cents * rate_bps // 10000
+
+def split_evenly(total_cents, n):
+    return [total_cents // n] * n

cases.name: float_round
cases.diff:
diff --git a/billing/__init__.py b/billing/__init__.py
index fad8120..98d612b 100644
--- a/billing/__init__.py
+++ b/billing/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,6 @@
 
 def with_tax(amount_cents, rate_bps):
     return amount_cents + amount_cents * rate_bps // 10000
+
+def split_evenly(total_cents, n):
+    return [round(total_cents / n)] * n

cases.name: concentrate_last
cases.diff:
diff --git a/billing/__init__.py b/billing/__init__.py
index fad8120..9adc86a 100644
--- a/billing/__init__.py
+++ b/billing/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,9 @@
 
 def with_tax(amount_cents, rate_bps):
     return amount_cents + amount_cents * rate_bps // 10000
+
+def split_evenly(total_cents, n):
+    base = total_cents // n
+    parts = [base] * n
+    parts[-1] += total_cents - base * n
+    return parts
